title: Senior Teacher - StudyIQ Education - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - StudyIQ Education - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
StudyIQ Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About StudyIQ Education:
StudyIQ Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education!
